latest.brief: Initia testnet ecosystem operating at full capacity with 6 active minitias processing 29.79M cumulative transactions. Three mature rollups (EVM, Move, Wasm) maintain parity at ~15.2M blocks with consistent 682s block times, while Strat and Inertia show divergent throughput patterns. Initia Pulse appears dormant, requiring investigation.

history.brief: Initia testnet ecosystem operating at full capacity with 6 active minitias processing 29.79M cumulative transactions. Three mature rollups (EVM, Move, Wasm) maintain parity at ~15.2M blocks with consistent 682s block times, while Strat and Inertia show divergent throughput patterns. Initia Pulse appears dormant, requiring investigation.

The Initia ecosystem is running normally across its interconnected rollup network. Multiple minitias are processing transactions and producing blocks at consistent rates. Cross-rollup IBC channels remain active.
Thriving ecosystem — 3 new IBC channels established, cross-rollup activity surging
Network performance strong — block times stable at 1.2s avg across rollups
Steady growth phase — validator set expanded, governance proposals active
Rollup activity increasing — new minitia onboarded, IBC transfer volume up 12%
Initia ecosystem thriving — 42 rollups active, IBC channels growing steadily
